playbook.intent: No eval harness → CI-integrated eval harness gating every prompt/tool/model change with regression score, adversarial pack, cost-per-success budget.
playbook.scope: From zero to a CI-integrated eval harness that gates every prompt/tool/model change with a regression score, an adversarial pack, a cost-per-success budget, and trajectory-level OTEL traces. Output: a green-or-red gate on every PR touching agent behavior.

success-criteria.criterion: Golden eval set ≥50 trajectories with judge labels
Adversarial pack ≥20 entries covering injection, refusal, drift
CI fails the PR on regression
OTEL traces queryable by trajectory id

stage.name: Curate Test Set
stage.intent: Source golden trajectories from production and synthetic seeds.

tasks.task: Sample N production trajectories stratified by intent
Add synthetic edge cases from rag-eval test-set generator
Tag each trajectory with expected behavior

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the set covers each intent class ≥5 cases.

stage.name: Build Judges
stage.intent: Calibrate LLM-judge rubrics and property-based invariants.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when judge κ ≥0.6 against human sample.

stage.name: Adversarial Pack
stage.intent: Stress the agent with fault injection and mutation cases.

tasks.task: Inject tool failures and rate limits
Add A/B harness for prompt versions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when pack covers ≥20 named failure modes.

stage.name: CI Wiring
stage.intent: Make the suite block every PR touching prompts, tools, or models.

tasks.task: Add CI job running suite on every PR
Wire OTEL trace upload per run

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a known regression PR is correctly blocked.

extra.value: [Online RLHF/preference training — separate playbook, Human-in-the-loop UX — covered elsewhere]
[At least one production agent path with logged traces, CI runner with secrets access]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content eval-harness-continuous-benchmark-suite --format md, agent: faion get-content eval-harness-continuous-benchmark-suite --format context, json: faion get-content eval-harness-continuous-benchmark-suite --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
